data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Upgrade for additional credits', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for an upgrade option, yet the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that demonstrate the existence or functionality of this upgrade feature. Therefore, a gap exists in the validation of this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the 'Upgrade for additional credits' feature.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint to verify upgrade functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define a concrete API call that checks for the availability and details of the upgrade for additional credits.
